latHint: Think unclear and hard to recall - not weather.
pivHint: Rainforests are often MISTY - but a MISTY memory means what kind of memory?
winText: Hard to pin down. MISTY was the pivot - forest haze to a VAGUE recollection.
lossText: VAGUE - unclear, hazy. MISTY was the pivot: rainforest mist to a VAGUE memory.
